title: Perplexity AI for Professional Research
modules: What Perplexity Actually Does: Search, Synthesis, and Where It Differs from Google
Prompt Strategies That Get Research-Grade Answers, Not Summaries
Evaluating Source Quality and Spotting Hallucination in Cited Responses
Integrating Perplexity into Daily Professional Research Workflows
When Not to Use Perplexity: Knowing the Tool's Hard Limits
synopsis: Perplexity AI sits at the intersection of search and language generation — and knowing how to use it deliberately separates professionals who get actionable intelligence from those who get plausible-sounding noise. This focused course teaches working professionals how to query effectively, assess citations critically, and embed Perplexity into research workflows without sacrificing accuracy for speed.
rationale: Perplexity is rapidly replacing traditional search for professional research tasks, yet most users apply it with no more rigor than a Google search — leading to confidently wrong outputs in high-stakes decisions.
learning_outcome: Learners will be able to construct targeted Perplexity queries, critically evaluate the sourced responses it generates, and make an informed decision about when it outperforms or should be replaced by traditional search methods.
